subject: Bare-chested figure in a low fighting stance, back marked with glowing demonic scars or sigils
description: A muscular bare-chested figure crouches in a wide low fighting stance, viewed from behind and slightly above. Their back, shoulders, and arms are etched with glowing red-orange demonic scars or brand-marks that smolder against dark skin. The hair is pulled back in a tight knot. Loose dark trousers fall over bent knees. The figure is rendered against a near-black void with faint embers or sparks suggesting heat radiating from the wounds. Lighting is harsh and rim-lit from the glow of the scars themselves, casting the body in chiaroscuro.
foreground: scarred crouching figure with glowing red brand-marks across the back
background: near-black void with faint embers and ambient red glow
emotion: tensed, coiled aggression; readiness for violence
